headline: How Can Meta Stock Fall 30%?
summary: Meta Platforms (META) is currently riding a wave of massive ad revenue acceleration. As of early 2026, the company has reported advertising revenue growth in the 22% to 26% range, fueled by sophisticated AI-driven targeting and the aggressive monetization of Reels and WhatsApp. However, market leadership at this scale is difficult to maintain.

headline: What Justifies Broadcom's 50x Multiple?
summary: While Nvidia (NVDA) is hailed as the king of AI compute, Broadcom (AVGO) is quietly working its way to becoming the landlord of the AI era. Most investors look at the stock's 50x trailing multiple and believe that the stock is priced for a "perfection" it can't possibly sustain. (See AVGO valuation multiples.

thumbnail.caption: Meta logo is seen in this illustration taken June 18, 2025. REUTERS/Dado Ruvic/Illustration

headline: Meta unveils first AI model from costly superintelligence team
summary: Meta Platforms on Wednesday unveiled Muse Spark, the first artificial intelligence model from a costly team it  assembled last year to catch up with rivals in the ‌AI race.  Shares of the company extended gains to trade up nearly 7%.  The stakes are especially high for Meta after it hired Scale ​AI CEO Alex Wang last year under a $14.3 billion deal and offered some engineers pay packages of hundreds of millions of dollars to staff a new superintelligence team.

content.title: Meta unveils first AI model from costly superintelligence team
content.summary: Meta Platforms on Wednesday unveiled Muse Spark, the first artificial intelligence model from a costly team it  assembled last year to catch up with rivals in the ‌AI race.  Shares of the company extended gains to trade up nearly 7%.  The stakes are especially high for Meta after it hired Scale ​AI CEO Alex Wang last year under a $14.3 billion deal and offered some engineers pay packages of hundreds of millions of dollars to staff a new superintelligence team.

headline: Dow spikes by over 1,300, oil prices retreat in ceasefire rally
summary: All three of the major indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Wednesday's session with colossal gains — the Dow Jones Industrial Average skyrocketed by over 1,320 points (2.85%) and the Nasdaq Composite surged by nearly 620 points (2.8%) — after President Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire last night. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.

content.title: Dow spikes by over 1,300, oil prices retreat in ceasefire rally
content.description:
All three of the major indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Wednesday's session with colossal gains — the Dow Jones Industrial Average skyrocketed by over 1,320 points (2.85%) and the Nasdaq Composite surged by nearly 620 points (2.8%) — after President Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire last night.

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.

headline: Meta unveils Muse Spark, its first AI model since hiring Alexandr Wang and a bellwether for CEO Mark Zuckerberg’s multibillion-dollar AI push
summary: The new model is competitive with rival AI models, according to data from Meta, but won’t be widely available outside Meta’s own product ecosystem.

content.title: Meta unveils Muse Spark, its first AI model since hiring Alexandr Wang and a bellwether for CEO Mark Zuckerberg’s multibillion-dollar AI push
content.summary: The new model is competitive with rival AI models, according to data from Meta, but won’t be widely available outside Meta’s own product ecosystem.

thumbnail.caption: Alexandr Wang, Meta’s chief AI officer, in February 2026. The company just announced the release of Muse Spark, its first AI model developed since Wang’s hiring.
